headline: Sir Burpsalot McFizz Invents Hat That Catches Your Burps And Recycles Them As Air Freshener
summary: 'The Burp Bonnet' converts gas into 'spring meadow' scent. 'It's sustainable,' McFizz claimed.
fullBody: Sir Burpsalot McFizz has invented 'The Burp Bonnet,' a hat that captures burps and transforms them into lavender-scented air freshener. 'Why waste a good belch?' McFizz asked. The hat also plays gentle harp music when activated. 'My office smells like a garden now,' one user said. 'Also, I look ridiculous.' McFizz is now developing a 'fart-powered fan' for 'aggressive ventilation.'
